titleStmt.title: SII 35.36: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 36. (A.R. No. 82 of 1950-51.) RĀMATĪRTHA, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Stone standing near the Rāmēśvara temple.

This damaged inscription which refers to the Tribhuvanamalladēva is ruling from Jayantipura is dated the Vikrama year 3[6], Nandana, Pushya śu 1, Monday solar eclipse, Uttarāyana-Saṁkranti. The date is irregular.

Registers gifts of land to the god Rāmēsvara for daily worship etc., made over to the hands of the teacher Rāmēśvara of Rāmatīrtha by certain gāvuṇḍas (names specified) and the Seventy of the village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē [.] traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁ
bhāya saṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvalla
bhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cā
ḷukya śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarōttarābhivṛddhi prava¨rddha
mānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti samadhigata
paṁca mahāsabdamahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara banavāsipuravarādhīśvaraṁ jayanti
puradalabdavaraprasāda mrigamadāmōda catryakṣakṣmāsaṁbhavaṁ caturā
cana ditāṣṭādasāsvamēdha
rakṣa di kaśi
maya ra ya
ḷa bhūṣaṇa
naṁ samarajaya
ṇamā dva ṇḍanāmāvaḷi virājita kadaṁ
ba maṇḍaḷēsvara ṇyadayaṁ sāsvata
ccasya tibi tta vā tti māgganaḷa ha
kra vikra cāgaṁ kaḷa janamana
ytadaḍi na baṇnisalaḷavē phaṇīṁdra
dharaṇirudra ṇi tējōviḷāsaṁ sada
radīravirakṣa ka pa pararāṣṭrāraṇya dā
vaḷasa sara pamā ta lu bhūpari
kuḷa saṁ pa . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvara
dēvaru banavāsipanni¨rccāsiramumaṁ pānuṁgalaynūṟumaṁ Ubhaya sā
duṣṭa nigraha siṣṭa khasaṁkathāvinōda
jyaṁ geyyuttamiḻda . sama ya tī¨rtthakeṁbadu svasti śrīma
cāḷukyavikramakālada 37 nēya naṁdanasaṁvatsarada puṣya śuddha pau
sōmavāra vyatipāta sū¨ryagrahaṇa Uttarāyaṇa
saṁkrāntiyaṁndu śrīrāmēsvaradēva¨rgge śrīgandha dhūpa nivēdya
vegayā jayappaga dēvālyada jī
[¨rṇnoddhā]rakka tapōdhanarāhāradānakkaṁ vidyādānakkaṁ paḍevola
biṭṭa mattaroṁbhattu ma sa¨rvabādhā parihā
ravāgi biṭṭaru . ma lada catussīmeya pramāṇuṁte
giṁ mūḍalu kūḍalagadde baḍagala siyahaḷḷaṁ mūḍalli
kallu hiriya sarivu pramāṇa . svastisamastaguṇasaṁpa
nidānaṁ savaleriya muddagāvuṇḍa tatputrasūnu svasti sa
mastaguṇasaṁpanna nuḍidu mattennaṁ śrīrāmadēvapādapaṁka
jabhramaraṁ māḷagāvuṁḍanumātanamaga boppagāvuṁṇḍanuṁ bammagāma
ṇḍanuṁ me¨rppadiṁbarumiṟdu . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāya
dhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭāṇa japapadaṁgūpa¨rharā
śīḷasaṁpannarappa śrīrāmatī¨rtthadācā¨ryyarappa
mēsvarapaṇḍitara kālaṁ ka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rrvakaṁ māḍi
svaradēva¨rgge hiriya keṟeya keḷage modalēriya
Aravattaruṣa ṟuya malliyūṟumaṭhada tōṭamaṁ biṭṭa
Iṁtī dha¨rmamaṁ pratipāḷisidava¨rgge vāraṇāsi prayāgeya¨rghya tī¨rttha ku
rukṣētradoḷu sāsirakavileyaṁ sāsi¨rvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇa
rubhayaṁ mukhigoṭṭa padamaku Intī dha¨rmmamanaḷidaṁge vāraṇāsi pra
ya ¨rghyatī¨rttha sāsirakavileyamaṁ sāsi¨rvvēdapāragarappa
ranaḷidamapaṁ pātakanakku . svadatta paradatta vā yō harēti vasuṁdha
rā ṣaṣṭi¨rvvaṣaṣahasrāni viṣṭāyā jāyatē krimi . sāmānyō
yaṁ dha¨rmasētu nripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālaniyō bhavadbhiḥ sa
¨rvvānētān bhāginaḥ pā¨rtthiveṁdrō bhūyō bhūyō yāca
tē rāmacaṁdra . bahubhi¨rvvasudā dattā rājabhissagarādibhi yasyaḥ
yasya yadā bhūmiḥ tasya tadā palaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 35.36 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
